views.title: Partner Pitch Deck
views.description: 15-slide reveal.js presentation covering the full platform story — capabilities, blueprints, value chain heatmap, feature library, and deployment model

views.title: Executive One-Pager
views.description: Single-page executive summary of the Business Agents platform value proposition and ROI case

views.title: ROI Calculator
views.description: Interactive calculator for estimating cost savings and productivity gains from agent deployment

views.title: Technical Architecture Overview
views.description: Deep-dive into the platform's technical architecture, integration patterns, and deployment options

views.title: Process Taxonomy Browser
views.description: APQC process classification framework browser for mapping agent capabilities to business processes

views.title: Agent Blueprint Viewer
views.description: Interactive viewer for agent blueprints — browse, filter, and explore all available agent definitions

views.title: Enterprise Operations Dashboard
views.description: Real-time enterprise-wide view of agent deployments, performance metrics, and operational status

views.title: Industry Value Chain Heatmap
views.description: Visual heatmap of agent automation opportunities mapped across industry value chains — 5 industries, L2/L3 drill-down

views.title: Pilot Agent Dashboard
views.description: Live run results and operational metrics for pilot agent deployments — tracks real execution data

views.title: DB Grand Matrix
views.description: Full 12×16 expandable grid of all database dimensions — functions, capability types, industries, opportunity scoring, and coverage

views.title: Opportunity Quadrant
views.description: Feasibility vs. value scatter plot of agent opportunities — bubble size = process count, quadrant = deployment priority

views.title: Process Treemap
views.description: Squarified treemap of all 127 processes — area = descendants, color = agent opportunity score, zoom and drill-down supported

views.title: Feature Reuse Network
views.description: SVG node-link diagram showing which platform features are shared across agent blueprints — reveals reusable building blocks

views.title: Authority Distribution
views.description: Stacked horizontal bars showing agent capability distribution across LOW, MEDIUM, and HIGH authority levels by function and type

views.title: Blueprint Architecture Flow
views.description: 6-stage swimlane diagram for each agent blueprint — data inputs, processing, decision gates, outputs, escalation paths

views.title: System Integration Map
views.description: Bipartite graph of 21 enterprise systems connected to 12 APQC functions — filter by READ, WRITE, or READ_WRITE integration type

views.title: Pricing & Engagement Model
views.description: Client-facing engagement model: three tiers (Discovery Sprint, Pilot, Platform), four phases, time-to-value chart, and FAQ

views.title: Client Engagement Portal
views.description: Shareable single-page prospect portal — tabbed: Overview, Process Explorer, Opportunities, Blueprints, Value Calculator. Personalised via ?client= URL param.

views.title: Client Onboarding Framework
views.description: Structured intake process: discovery questionnaire with JSON export, process relevance scorer, and interactive engagement checklist

views.title: Productivity Multiplier
views.description: Client-facing page making the value case: one person with agents does the work of five — role-by-role breakdowns, time analysis, and the economics

views.title: KPIs & Benefits Realization
views.description: Before/after KPI framework by function plus a post-implementation tracking framework — baselines, measurement timeline, and 90-day success criteria

views.title: Opportunity Prioritization Tool
views.description: Interactive 2×2 workshop tool — score up to 10 agentic opportunities across 8 sub-dimensions (Value Potential × Execution Effort), plot live bubbles, export ranked shortlist. Add ?mode=internal for epic prioritization view.

views.title: Responsible AI Framework
views.description: Six-pillar responsible AI framework — Transparency, Oversight, Fairness, Privacy, Accountability, Robustness — mapped to platform capabilities

views.title: Value Realized Dashboard
views.description: ROI tracking for pilot agents: hours saved, PRs created, exceptions caught, and $ value realized.

views.name: Operations Dashboard
views.description: Operations Manager persona dashboard: replenishment and demand forecast agents, KPI bar, activity feed.

views.name: Finance Dashboard
views.description: Finance Controller persona dashboard: AP invoice and cost variance agent pipeline, approval queue.

views.name: Compliance Dashboard
views.description: Compliance Officer persona dashboard: Quality CAPA agent live KPIs, CAPA approval queue, audit trail.

views.name: Agent View
views.description: Per-agent drill-down: run history, KPI trends, last output viewer, approval queue, and lifecycle gate status.

views.name: Enterprise Portfolio Dashboard
views.description: C-suite rollup: lifecycle funnel, industry coverage table, value realized, function heatmap, RAI coverage across all 40 blueprints.
